Looking to settle an argument I had via the court of public opinion: Does Morimens and Reverse: 1999 have the same art style?
Insane statement ngl. In no way do these games share an art style whether it’s sprites, images, or even backgrounds
Some of the morimens artists left to work on r99 back when the game was on the verge of eos

Not at all. Even their palettes, themes and character designs are almost polar opposites.
The only super thin thread they share is they're chibi art card games.
And they have animated ults. But other than that, not really, no.

Just pull for Maribell, much Plot many Story
Some epiphanies allow for absolutely cracked gameplay when copied multiple times or paired with other cards that also have cracked epiphanies
There are a lot of vids on YT explaining that but you pretty much can understand all about savedata from in-game tutorial/tips
One example is Tressa. She has the Shadow Reload card that can have an epiphany that gices you a Shadow Dagger everytime you get healed.
By chance, you can copy that card (most I've seen is 4) and pair it with heals from Mika or Orlea
You get what I call "The British Dream"
Near endless amounts of shankers, letting you stack over 50 agony that can possibly kill bosses in a couple of turns, given you play her Curse and Cursed Gouge cards first
Another example is Beryl's Opening Found card that lets her deal extra damage for every retaining card she owns in hand
4 of those, while having 4 of Beryl's retaining cards in hand, will make her shoot the enemy **sixteen times**
